- Store run transcripts and artifacts under per-agent subdirectories (e.g.,
`.codex/agents/<agent>/instances/<run-id>/`) so concurrent runs never collide
and history stays grouped by agent; each `run.json` captures prompt, flags, exit

1. System Overview

The Fleet Management System (FMS) is a web and mobile application designed

AC1: Use algorithms (e.g. graph-based) to compute routes considering multi-
stop deliveries, traffic data, and vehicle constraints (e.g., fuel range).

AC1: Driver scans items at delivery; sync proof-of-delivery (POD) back to
FMS.
